title: Iranian strikes on bases used by US caused $800m in damage, new analysis shows
summary_full: Much of the damage was caused in initial retaliatory strikes by Iran in the week after the US and Israel launched its operation.
summary_public: Much of the damage was caused in initial retaliatory strikes by Iran in the week after the US and Israel launched its operation.
